issues.claim: Analog does not equally apply elsewhere
issues.objection: Force-fit test for 7.29: the analog (thread 3 (knowing-at-departure; STRETCHED; forward-pointer to Ch 8)) is anchored to the verse's specific structural claim; it would not apply to a randomly chosen alternate verse. The verse's central image — for 7.29, the image specifically tied to thread 3 (knowing-at-departure; STRETCHED; forward-pointer to Ch 8) — is what the engineering scenario depends on; substituting another verse's image breaks the analog. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Heavily metaphysical and forward-pointing. Verse seeds Ch 8's adhyātma/brahman/karma typology. Engineering analog scoped at career-end substrate-articulability. Counter-example: tacit untransmitted gnosis is the failure mode of the analog.

notes: Force-fit test for 7.29: the engineering analog cannot equally well derive from a different verse. Tags (long-term-thinking, first-principles, operator-system-coupling) are anchored on this verse's specific claim. PASS.
